ogTitle: Tanjil Bren vs Tanwood: Climate Safety

heading: Tanjil Bren vs Tanwood — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tanjil Bren, Victoria and Tanwood, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tanwood has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Tanjil Bren (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tanjil Bren or Tanwood safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tanjil Bren has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Tanwood scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tanjil Bren scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Tanwood scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tanjil Bren or Tanwood?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tanwood has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
